heading: Allocation of funds
label: 17153 Allocation of funds

children.text: 34 percent to eligible units of local government—alternative 1, in accordance with subsection (b);
34 percent to eligible units of local government—alternative 2, in accordance with subsection (b);
28 percent to States in accordance with subsection (c);
2 percent to Indian tribes in accordance with subsection (d); and
2 percent for competitive grants under .section 17156 of this title

children.heading: Eligible units of local government
children.label: b Eligible units of local government

children.text: the populations served by the eligible units of local government, according to the latest available decennial census; and
the daytime populations of the eligible units of local government and other similar factors (such as square footage of commercial, office, and industrial space), as determined by the Secretary.
not less than 1.25 percent to each State; and

children.label: A
children.text: the population of each State; and

children.label: B
children.text: any other criteria that the Secretary determines to be appropriate.

children.heading: Indian tribes
children.label: d Indian tribes
children.text: Of amounts available for distribution to Indian tribes under subsection (a)(3), the Secretary shall establish a formula for allocation of the amounts to Indian tribes, taking into account any factors that the Secretary determines to be appropriate.

children.heading: Publication of allocation formulas
children.label: e Publication of allocation formulas
children.text: Not later than 90 days before the beginning of each fiscal year for which grants are provided under this part, the Secretary shall publish in the Federal Register the formulas for allocation established under this section.

children.heading: State and local advisory committee
children.label: f State and local advisory committee
children.text: The Secretary shall establish a State and local advisory committee to advise the Secretary regarding administration, implementation, and evaluation of the program.
